requirement_topic.en: Photobiological Safety — Blue Light Hazard (IEC 62471 Risk Groups)
requirement_topic.zh: 光生物安全——蓝光危害（IEC 62471 危险组别）
requirement_topic.zht: 光生物安全——藍光危害（IEC 62471 危險組別）

summary.en: Photobiological safety of LED lamps and luminaires in Uganda is assessed against IEC 62471 (Photobiological safety of lamps and lamp systems), adopted as a Uganda Standard / IEC reference, where this falls within the UNBS regulated-product and PVoC assessment scope. IEC 62471 classifies products into risk groups from RG0 (Exempt — no hazard) through RG1, RG2, to RG3 (High risk), based on blue-light-weighted radiance and irradiance limits. Where photobiological safety is part of the assessment for a given lamp/luminaire type, the risk-group classification and supporting test evidence form part of the technical documentation reviewed for the UNBS Certificate of Conformity. Uganda follows the IEC method directly rather than the EU EN 62471 harmonised version, and there is no Uganda equivalent of the EU Ecodesign Regulation that makes risk-group declaration a horizontal legal obligation.
summary.zh: 乌干达对 LED 灯及灯具的光生物安全依据 IEC 62471（灯和灯系统的光生物安全）评估，该标准采用为乌干达标准/IEC 参考，适用于属 UNBS 受管制产品及 PVoC 评估范围的情形。IEC 62471 依据蓝光加权辐亮度和辐照度限值将产品分为 RG0（豁免——无危害）、RG1、RG2 至 RG3（高危险）危险组别。当光生物安全属于特定灯/灯具类型的评估内容时，危险组别分类及支持检测证据构成 UNBS 符合性证书所审查技术文件的组成部分。乌干达直接采用 IEC 方法而非欧盟 EN 62471 协调版本，且乌干达无相当于欧盟生态设计法规将危险组别声明作为横向法律义务的制度。
summary.zht: 烏干達對 LED 燈及燈具的光生物安全依據 IEC 62471（燈和燈系統的光生物安全）評估，該標準採用為烏干達標準/IEC 參考，適用於屬 UNBS 受管制產品及 PVoC 評估範圍的情形。IEC 62471 依據藍光加權輻亮度和輻照度限值將產品分為 RG0（豁免——無危害）、RG1、RG2 至 RG3（高危險）危險組別。當光生物安全屬於特定燈/燈具類型的評估內容時，危險組別分類及支持檢測證據構成 UNBS 符合性證書所審查技術文件的組成部分。烏干達直接採用 IEC 方法而非歐盟 EN 62471 協調版本，且烏干達無相當於歐盟生態設計法規將危險組別聲明作為橫向法律義務的制度。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62471 (adopted as Uganda Standard / IEC reference) — Photobiological safety of lamps and lamp systems (risk group classification)
UNBS Pre-Export Verification of Conformity (PVoC) programme — supporting technical documentation where in scope

summary.en: China has adopted GB/T 20145-2006 (Photobiological safety of lamps and lamp systems), technically equivalent to IEC 62471:2006. GB/T 20145 is a recommended standard (T = tuijian, recommended) and is not universally mandatory for all LED luminaires in the Chinese market; enforcement for residential luminaires is limited. As a recommended standard, it is generally not a prerequisite for CCC, though some product test packages include it.
summary.zh: 中国已采用 GB/T 20145-2006（灯和灯系统的光生物安全），技术上等同于 IEC 62471:2006。GB/T 20145 为推荐性标准（T = 推荐），并非对所有中国市场 LED 灯具均为强制要求；对居民灯具的执行力度有限。作为推荐性标准，通常不是 CCC 的前置条件，但部分产品测试套餐会包含。
summary.zht: 中國已採用 GB/T 20145-2006（燈和燈系統的光生物安全），技術上等同於 IEC 62471:2006。GB/T 20145 為推薦性標準（T = 推薦），並非對所有中國市場 LED 燈具均為強制要求；對居民燈具的執行力度有限。作為推薦性標準，通常不是 CCC 的前置條件，但部分產品測試套餐會包含。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 20145-2006 — Photobiological safety of lamps and lamp systems (China — recommended standard, equivalent to IEC 62471:2006)

gap.en: Both Uganda (IEC 62471 reference) and China (GB/T 20145, equivalent to IEC 62471:2006) share the IEC technical method, so the risk-group classification approach is the same. The differences are about status and routing: (1) in Uganda, photobiological safety is assessed where it is within the applicable UNBS PVoC scope for the product type, and the evidence supports the consignment CoC rather than a separate horizontal regulation; (2) China's GB/T 20145 is recommended-only and lightly enforced for residential luminaires; (3) neither Uganda nor China imposes the EU-style mandatory blue-light-class label on packaging (contrast with the EU). Manufacturers should document the IEC 62471 risk group; products classified RG2/RG3 should carry appropriate warnings and usage instructions regardless of market. A Chinese GB/T 20145 report aligned with IEC 62471 may be accepted by the appointed PVoC body subject to confirmation.
gap.zh: 乌干达（IEC 62471 参考）与中国（GB/T 20145，等同于 IEC 62471:2006）共享 IEC 技术方法，故危险组别分类方法相同。差异在于属性与路径：（1）在乌干达，当光生物安全属于该产品类型适用的 UNBS PVoC 范围时进行评估，证据支持批次 CoC，而非独立的横向法规；（2）中国 GB/T 20145 仅为推荐性标准，对居民灯具执行力度较弱；（3）乌干达与中国均不强制要求欧盟式的包装蓝光等级标签（与欧盟形成对比）。制造商应记录 IEC 62471 危险组别；无论目标市场，分类为 RG2/RG3 的产品均应附带相应警告及使用说明。与 IEC 62471 对齐的中国 GB/T 20145 报告可能被指定 PVoC 机构接受，但须确认。
gap.zht: 烏干達（IEC 62471 參考）與中國（GB/T 20145，等同於 IEC 62471:2006）共享 IEC 技術方法，故危險組別分類方法相同。差異在於屬性與路徑：（1）在烏干達，當光生物安全屬於該產品類型適用的 UNBS PVoC 範圍時進行評估，證據支持批次 CoC，而非獨立的橫向法規；（2）中國 GB/T 20145 僅為推薦性標準，對居民燈具執行力度較弱；（3）烏干達與中國均不強制要求歐盟式的包裝藍光等級標籤（與歐盟形成對比）。製造商應記錄 IEC 62471 危險組別；無論目標市場，分類為 RG2/RG3 的產品均應附帶相應警告及使用說明。與 IEC 62471 對齊的中國 GB/T 20145 報告可能被指定 PVoC 機構接受，但須確認。

mandatory_status.target: Conditional — IEC 62471 photobiological safety assessed where within the UNBS PVoC scope for the product type; supports the Certificate of Conformity, but Uganda has no EU-style horizontal risk-group declaration mandate
mandatory_status.cn: Recommended — GB/T 20145-2006 is a recommended (non-mandatory) standard; enforcement for residential luminaires is limited

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Photobiological safety for LED products entering Uganda is assessed against IEC 62471 (adopted as a Uganda Standard / IEC reference) where it falls within the UNBS PVoC scope for the product type, supporting the Certificate of Conformity rather than a separate horizontal regulation. China's GB/T 20145-2006 is an IEC-62471-equivalent recommended standard, so the classification method is shared. Document the risk group; RG2/RG3 products should carry warnings. Neither Uganda nor China mandates an EU-style blue-light-class package label.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 进入乌干达的 LED 产品光生物安全在属该产品类型 UNBS PVoC 范围时依据 IEC 62471（采用为乌干达标准/IEC 参考）评估，支持符合性证书而非独立横向法规。中国 GB/T 20145-2006 为等同 IEC 62471 的推荐性标准，故分类方法相通。请记录危险组别；RG2/RG3 产品应附带警告。乌干达与中国均不强制要求欧盟式的包装蓝光等级标签。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 進入烏干達的 LED 產品光生物安全在屬該產品類型 UNBS PVoC 範圍時依據 IEC 62471（採用為烏干達標準/IEC 參考）評估，支持符合性證書而非獨立橫向法規。中國 GB/T 20145-2006 為等同 IEC 62471 的推薦性標準，故分類方法相通。請記錄危險組別；RG2/RG3 產品應附帶警告。烏干達與中國均不強制要求歐盟式的包裝藍光等級標籤。

requirement_topic.en: Blue Light Hazard Labelling — No Horizontal Uganda Mandate (vs EU label)
requirement_topic.zh: 蓝光危害标识——乌干达无横向强制要求（对比欧盟标签）
requirement_topic.zht: 藍光危害標識——烏干達無橫向強制要求（對比歐盟標籤）

summary.en: Uganda does NOT operate an EU-style mandatory blue-light-hazard class label on luminaire packaging. Unlike the EU energy-labelling regime (which since 2021 requires a blue-light hazard class on the product label), Uganda has no horizontal regulation requiring a plain-language blue-light class to be printed on packaging or online listings. Any photobiological information is handled through the IEC 62471 risk-group classification in the technical documentation supporting the UNBS PVoC assessment (see ledug-photobio-01), and through generic product safety warnings for higher risk groups. Where a product is classified RG2 or RG3, appropriate hazard warnings and usage instructions are expected as good safety practice and may be required by the appointed inspection body, but there is no standardised Uganda blue-light label format.
summary.zh: 乌干达不实行欧盟式的灯具包装强制蓝光危害等级标签。与欧盟能效标识制度（自 2021 年起要求在产品标签上标注蓝光危害等级）不同，乌干达无横向法规要求在包装或在线列表上印制通俗语言的蓝光等级。任何光生物信息通过支持 UNBS PVoC 评估的技术文件中的 IEC 62471 危险组别分类处理（见 ledug-photobio-01），并通过针对较高危险组别的通用产品安全警告处理。当产品分类为 RG2 或 RG3 时，作为良好安全惯例应附带相应危害警告及使用说明，指定检验机构也可能要求，但乌干达无标准化的蓝光标签格式。
summary.zht: 烏干達不實行歐盟式的燈具包裝強制藍光危害等級標籤。與歐盟能效標識制度（自 2021 年起要求在產品標籤上標註藍光危害等級）不同，烏干達無橫向法規要求在包裝或在線列表上印製通俗語言的藍光等級。任何光生物信息通過支持 UNBS PVoC 評估的技術文件中的 IEC 62471 危險組別分類處理（見 ledug-photobio-01），並通過針對較高危險組別的通用產品安全警告處理。當產品分類為 RG2 或 RG3 時，作為良好安全慣例應附帶相應危害警告及使用說明，指定檢驗機構也可能要求，但烏干達無標準化的藍光標籤格式。

standards_or_laws: No horizontal Uganda blue-light-class labelling regulation — photobiological information handled via IEC 62471 risk group in UNBS PVoC technical documentation
IEC 62471 (adopted as Uganda Standard / IEC reference) — basis for any risk-group-based warnings

summary.en: China's China Energy Label (CEL) under GB 30255 (LED room luminaires energy efficiency) does not include a blue-light hazard class either. The Chinese labelling regime focuses on energy efficiency grades (Grade 1–3) and lumen output, with no regulatory requirement to print a photobiological risk-group class on luminaire packaging. In this respect China and Uganda are aligned — both differ from the EU, which mandates a blue-light class on the product label.
summary.zh: 中国依据 GB 30255（LED 室内照明产品能效要求）推行的中国能效标识（CEL）同样不包含蓝光危害等级。中国标签制度侧重能效等级（1–3 级）及光通量输出，无规定要求在灯具包装上印制光生物危险组别等级。在这一点上中国与乌干达一致——二者均与欧盟不同，欧盟强制要求在产品标签上标注蓝光等级。
summary.zht: 中國依據 GB 30255（LED 室內照明產品能效要求）推行的中國能效標識（CEL）同樣不包含藍光危害等級。中國標籤制度側重能效等級（1–3 級）及光通量輸出，無規定要求在燈具包裝上印製光生物危險組別等級。在這一點上中國與烏干達一致——二者均與歐盟不同，歐盟強制要求在產品標籤上標註藍光等級。

standards_or_laws: GB 30255-2019 — Energy efficiency requirements for LED room luminaires (China — no blue-light class requirement)

gap.en: Here Uganda and China are aligned and both diverge from the EU: neither imposes a mandatory blue-light-hazard class label on luminaire packaging. For a Chinese manufacturer exporting to Uganda, this means there is no new EU-style label artwork to add for blue light — a reduction in obligation compared with EU export. However, manufacturers should still: (1) document the IEC 62471 risk group in the technical file supporting UNBS PVoC; (2) provide hazard warnings and usage instructions for any RG2/RG3 product as good safety practice and where the appointed inspection body requires it; (3) not assume that the absence of a label requirement removes the need for the underlying risk-group assessment where photobiological safety is in the PVoC scope. The key takeaway: the EU blue-light label obligation has no Uganda counterpart.
gap.zh: 在此乌干达与中国一致，且二者均与欧盟不同：均不强制要求在灯具包装上标注蓝光危害等级标签。对向乌干达出口的中国制造商而言，这意味着无需为蓝光新增欧盟式标签设计——较出口欧盟为义务的减少。但制造商仍应：（1）在支持 UNBS PVoC 的技术文件中记录 IEC 62471 危险组别；（2）作为良好安全惯例并在指定检验机构要求时，为任何 RG2/RG3 产品提供危害警告及使用说明；（3）不应假定无标签要求即可免除在光生物安全属 PVoC 范围时的底层危险组别评估。要点：欧盟蓝光标签义务在乌干达无对应。
gap.zht: 在此烏干達與中國一致，且二者均與歐盟不同：均不強制要求在燈具包裝上標註藍光危害等級標籤。對向烏干達出口的中國製造商而言，這意味著無需為藍光新增歐盟式標籤設計——較出口歐盟為義務的減少。但製造商仍應：（1）在支持 UNBS PVoC 的技術文件中記錄 IEC 62471 危險組別；（2）作為良好安全慣例並在指定檢驗機構要求時，為任何 RG2/RG3 產品提供危害警告及使用說明；（3）不應假定無標籤要求即可免除在光生物安全屬 PVoC 範圍時的底層危險組別評估。要點：歐盟藍光標籤義務在烏干達無對應。

mandatory_status.target: Not required (no horizontal mandate) — Uganda has no EU-style blue-light-class package label; risk-group information is handled via IEC 62471 in PVoC technical documentation and RG2/RG3 warnings
mandatory_status.cn: Not required — China Energy Label (GB 30255) does not include a blue-light hazard class

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Uganda has no EU-style mandatory blue-light-hazard class label for luminaire packaging — in this respect it aligns with China and differs from the EU. There is no new label artwork to add for blue light when exporting to Uganda. Manufacturers should still document the IEC 62471 risk group in the UNBS PVoC technical file where photobiological safety is in scope, and provide hazard warnings for RG2/RG3 products as good safety practice. The EU blue-light labelling obligation has no Uganda counterpart.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 乌干达无欧盟式的灯具包装强制蓝光危害等级标签——在此与中国一致，与欧盟不同。出口乌干达时无需为蓝光新增标签设计。在光生物安全属范围时，制造商仍应在 UNBS PVoC 技术文件中记录 IEC 62471 危险组别，并作为良好安全惯例为 RG2/RG3 产品提供危害警告。欧盟蓝光标识义务在乌干达无对应。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 烏干達無歐盟式的燈具包裝強制藍光危害等級標籤——在此與中國一致，與歐盟不同。出口烏干達時無需為藍光新增標籤設計。在光生物安全屬範圍時，製造商仍應在 UNBS PVoC 技術文件中記錄 IEC 62471 危險組別，並作為良好安全慣例為 RG2/RG3 產品提供危害警告。歐盟藍光標識義務在烏干達無對應。
